summary: Implemented 8 approved UI suggestions: wired Approve button to spawn agent, tasks grouped under project headings, tasks-dashboard-* mapped to DASHBOARD project, suggestions rendered above task cards, agent log parsed with styled HTML (tool/done/error lines), auto-refresh pauses on form input focus, ~/Projects/ scanned for all project discovery (ikigai etc.), and completed tasks show Merge Branch/Archive/Delete Worktree action buttons.
howToTest: Open http://localhost:4000 and verify sidebar shows all projects from ~/Projects/ including IKIGAI, DASHBOARD
Click SDTV in sidebar - suggestions panel should appear ABOVE task cards
Click Approve on a suggestion - should show 'Spawning...' and call /api/spawn-agent
Click '+ Add suggestion' and focus an input - auto-refresh should pause (check no DOM flicker)
Blur the input - auto-refresh should resume after 100ms
Scroll to a completed task card - should see Merge Branch, Archive, Delete Worktree buttons
Click any action button on completed task - should show a toast notification
Expand Agent Log on a task - lines should be color-coded (purple for tools, green for done, red for errors)
Verify tasks-dashboard-suggestions appears under DASHBOARD project group
